title: Response to an inspection of the management of fee waiver applications
body: "The Home Office responds to the Independent Chief Inspector of Borders and Immigration’s (ICIBI) report titled ‘An inspection of the Home Office’s management of fee waiver applications’  The Home Office accepts or partially accepts all of the 8 recommendations.    Date of inspection: August 2024 to November 2024. "

taxons.title: Inspections of border, immigration and asylum services
